R

radius - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.workers.PreprocessingApplyMedianWorker
The median filter radius in pixels.
radius - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.workers.PreprocessingPreviewMedianWorker
The median filter radius in pixels.
refreshHistogramData() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
Reloads the histogram data from the current slice of the active image and updates the HistogramPanel display.
resetButton - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
 
resetButtonAction(boolean) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ImageSourcePanel
Resets the current image, by calling the resetCurrentImage method.
resetCalibrationButton - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
 
resetCurrentImage(ImagePlus, ImagePlus) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ImageSourcePanel
Resets the image currently opened, by replacing it with the one without any modifications.
resetManualCalibrationSpinner() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Reset the value of the calibration spinner.
resetMedianRadius() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
Resets median radius to its default value.
resetMorphologyPreview(ImagePlus) - Method in interface fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.LDCService
 
resetMorphologyPreview(ImagePlus) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.LDCServiceImpl
 
resetPanels() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.LeftPanel
Reset all pipeline sub panels, for when the image is reseted.
ALSO set the preprocessing panel as the current sub-panel shown.
resetPreview(ImagePlus) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.leftpanel.MorphologyManager
Resets ALL slices back to the clean binary state
resetSaturatedContrast() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
Resets contrast enhancement to its default value.
resetThreshold() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
Resets the threshold on the current image, re-enables the panel controls, and resets the UI components to their default state.
resetThreshold(ImagePlus) - Method in interface fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.LDCService
Reset threshold.
resetThreshold(ImagePlus) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.LDCServiceImpl
 
resetThreshold(ImagePlus) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.leftpanel.ThresholdingManager
Resets the threshold on the given image, removing any threshold overlay.
resetUIComponents() - Method in interface fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.PipelineSubPanel
Reset the sub-panel UI components, for when the image is reseted.
resetUIComponents() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.MorphologyPanel
Resets all UI components to their default values: operation set to None, watershed unchecked, and preview unchecked.
resetUIComponents() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
 
resetUIComponents() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
Resets all UI components to their default values and re-enables only the top-level checkboxes (contrast and median filter).
resetUIComponents() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
Resets all UI components to their default values: method set to Manual, dark background unchecked, sliders and spinners set to zero, and threshold cleared on the current image if one is open.
rightContent - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.MainGUI_LDC
 
RightPanel - Class in fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.rightpanel
The JPanel at the right in the MainGUI_LDC.
RightPanel(Context, LeftPanel) - Constructor for class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.rightpanel.RightPanel
Constructor for the RightPanel.
run() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.commands.PluginCommandLDC
Opens the plugin main GUI.
